complaint_text: I just noticed a transaction of INR 24,500 on my credit card statement dated yesterday that I absolutely did not make. I was at work the entire day and my card never left my wallet. This is extremely worrying and I need this resolved immediately. Please block my card and tell me how I get my money back.

There are two withdrawals from my savings account totalling $850 that I did not authorise, both made from an ATM in a city I have never visited. I only found out when I checked my balance this morning and it was far lower than expected. I am quite upset and need to understand what happens next.

My debit card was used for an online purchase of INR 12,000 at a retailer I have never heard of. I still have my physical card in my possession, so I don't understand how this happened. I want this transaction reversed and I want to know if my card details have been compromised.

I am writing to report that three small transactions, each under $5, appeared on my account this week from a subscription service I never signed up for. While the amounts are small individually, I am concerned this could be a sign of a larger issue with my card security.
